__description: AI-generated content recommendations for SQL content_suggestions table (ContentSuggestion ORM). Generated from chatbot trend clusters + review analysis. combined_score = weighted sum of chatbot_count, review_count, review_neg_pct. v1.2 updates 'type' to specific content formats and 'script_json' to an array to match the updated Content Agent API.

content_suggestions.title: <string: descriptive title for the content piece>
content_suggestions.chatbot_count: <int: number of related chatbot messages in past 7 days>
content_suggestions.chatbot_topic: <string: summary of what customers are asking about>
content_suggestions.review_neg_pct: <int: 0–100, % of those reviews that are negative/neutral>
content_suggestions.estimated_impact: <string: predicted business impact, e.g. 'Giảm ~50% câu hỏi về X, tăng CR 5–8%'>
content_suggestions.estimated_production: <string: effort to produce, e.g. '1 ngày quay + editing'>
content_suggestions.angle: <string: recommended content angle / key message to lead with>
content_suggestions.script_json: <array|null: optional — list of pre-generated script objects containing variant/hook/body/cta/hashtags. E.g. [{"variant": "emotional", "hook": "..."}]>
